narrative:
Fremont City 4-D (precinct in Sandusky County) has 482 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
